problem: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary?
mechanism: Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis
hypothesis: The key to Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary? is Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis — specifically Vagus nerve stimulation — which would help 24,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
